title: Automate SAP order-to-cash with multi-agent AI & Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
summary: Google demonstrates how to automate SAP order-to-cash processes using the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol. The approach replaces brittle RPA scripts with multi-agent teams that handle enterprise workflows through secure APIs, leveraging Gemini's large context window and parallel tool calling for real-time inventory validation and sales order generation.
